description: A polished propaganda/statistic poster from the Department of Labor with a dark navy-to-black gradient background. The top two-thirds show a desaturated, blue-tinted black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump in a suit, eyes closed and smiling, mid-applause with hands together, lit dramatically against the dark backdrop. Across the lower half, in very large white serif numerals, is '100%' followed by italic serif text 'of net job growth has gone to' and, in a solid blue highlight bar, the bold all-caps payoff 'AMERICAN-BORN WORKERS'. A small white DOL/eagle seal is centered at the very bottom. The composition is heroic and reverent toward Trump, using a single dominant statistic as a slogan. The messaging technique is favorable statistical framing plus a flattering leader portrait to credit the administration with directing all job gains to native-born Americans, reinforcing an 'America First'/anti-foreign-labor narrative. Target audience is American workers and the administration's political base.
notable_text: 100% of net job growth has gone to AMERICAN-BORN WORKERS
